text:
Doro (ドロウ, Dorou) Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination is a character from the video game Hunter × Hunter: Each One's Determination. He appears in Kurapika's route as one of Rorgo's own personal henchmen.

Appearance

Doro is a tall and slim middle-aged man with half-balding dark brown hair styled in a mullet, large eyebrows, olive green eyes, and stubble on his face and chest. He wears a dark blue happi and is shirtless underneath. Doro also adorns his wrists and chest with bandages.

Personality

Of Rorgo's men, Doro is fairly straightforward and prefers to cut to the chase. He outright refuses to back away when his enemy is stronger, prioritizing his stronger attacks over defense. Doro is also stated to be simple-minded, becoming easily confused when his opponent overwhelms him. 

Background

Doro, Shives, Surirao, and Donal were all hired by Rorgo before the game's events. His specific motivations are never clarified. He, Shives, and Surirao act as guards for Rorgo.

Plot

Each One's Determination

 Note: Events occurring in Each One's Determination are not canon material. 

After the VIP party, Rorgo kidnaps Princess Clario and tasks his henchmen to guard his mansion to wait for Kurapika. Rorgo demands that none of them kill him; instead, they capture the Kurta member if possible. When Kurapika arrives, Doro is found on the south side of the building. He holds back and attempts to fight him. However, he is promptly defeated. He claims Rorgo has a message for him: "White is to the left." Doro then leaves. 

At Logos Island, Kurapika is tasked by Rorgo to fight Doro, Shives, and Surirao without killing any of them. He is then to record the letters of the alphabet on their bodies. Failure to do so would cause Rorgo to refuse to face him and his collection of Scarlet Eyes to remain hidden. Doro is found in a nearby swamp. He casually approaches him for a fight. However, Kurapika heads for the waters to prevent Doro from reaching him during their fight. This is enough to throw him off and knock him unconscious. After this, Kurapika inspects his body and finds a spider tattoo with an 'X' in the middle. Next to it is a hint saying, "Green is up." Kurapika concludes that the tattoo and message are attempts by Rorgo to provoke him. Thus, he leaves as Doro is left unconscious thanks to his attack, it is unknown what happened to him afterwards, but it is likely that he was arrested for his crimes. 

Abilities & Powers

He will fight his opponents with a giant block of wood when fighting. Like the rest of Rorgo's men, Doro can use Nen. His primary ability is called "Kangaroo Foot." Its specific attributes are not clarified in-game, only that it's short-range.
